eligible_applicant_type: Arts Venues of a Connecticut College/University
geographic_restrictions: All activities must be conducted in Connecticut.
project_area: Artistic activities including music, theater, dance, painting, sculpture, literature, film, and allied arts and crafts.
demographic_requirements: None specified beyond eligibility criteria for applicant types.
eligibility_summary: Applicants must be Connecticut-based arts organizations, municipal arts departments, or arts venues affiliated with a Connecticut college/university. Eligible applicants must meet specific criteria such as 501(c)(3) status (for arts organizations), dedicated budget allocations (for municipal arts departments), or broad public audience support (for college/university arts venues). DUNS number is required for application.
